props.ChoiceText: In brutal company, one bond mattered enough to make the work feel less empty.
props.ChoiceBio: A hard campaign friendship proved that even mercenary life can leave one honest loyalty behind.

0.TargetText: A comrade from the hard campaign who still counts you as true.
0.TransitionText: Because a hard campaign friendship proved that even mercenary life can leave one honest loyalty behind, paid violence remained the surest trade you knew.
0.TransitionPrompt: This could carry you into Mercenary, but you may remain on your current path instead.

1.TransitionText: Because a hard campaign friendship proved that even mercenary life can leave one honest loyalty behind, hardship seasoned you into a veteran.
1.TransitionPrompt: This could carry you into Veteran, but you may remain on your current path instead.

2.TransitionText: Because a hard campaign friendship proved that even mercenary life can leave one honest loyalty behind, soldiering for pay changed into something else.
2.TransitionPrompt: This could carry you into Infantry, but you may remain on your current path instead.

1.TargetText: A campaign friend who would still share bread, warning, or shelter with you.
